name: J23 JC23 - Open-Back Inclinable Power Press
description: A versatile and reliable open-back inclinable power press series, ideal for a wide range of metal forming applications such as punching, blanking, bending, and shallow drawing operations. The robust cast iron frame ensures stability and performance, while the inclinable design facilitates efficient scrap removal.
features: Inclinable frame for easy scrap discharge
Precision machining and adjustable ram stroke
Reliable turn-key clutch and brake system

name: MECC Y2/Y23 Series Three-Phase Asynchronous Motor
description: MECC Y2/Y23 Series IEC-frame three-phase asynchronous squirrel-cage motors for continuous-duty industrial service. The catalog covers broad power and frame ranges with multiple pole options, standard 50 Hz operation, optional 60 Hz configuration, and IEC-compliant dimensions for straightforward replacement and integration.

technical_specifications.Rated Voltage: 380 V nominal (three-phase Delta/Y); optional 220/380 V, 230/400 V, 400/690 V by model
technical_specifications.Voltage Tolerance: As specified in catalog tables by model
technical_specifications.Frequency: 50 Hz standard (60 Hz available on request)
technical_specifications.Rated speed (RPM): Below synchronous speed; detailed values by model in PDF catalog
technical_specifications.Efficiency Class: Catalog values vary by model and pole count
technical_specifications.Power Factor: Catalog values vary by model and load point

features: Rugged cast-iron construction for industrial environments
Wide 0.12-315 kW coverage across IEC frame sizes
B3, B5, and B35 mounting compatibility
Class F insulation with IP54/IP55 protection design
50 Hz standard platform with 60 Hz option by request
IEC dimension standardization for easier replacement and maintenance

name: YJS Series Compact Three-Phase Asynchronous Motor
description: YJS Series compact three-phase cage induction motors are designed for broad industrial use with compact construction, improved protection, reliable operation, low noise, low vibration, and convenient installation and maintenance. The series uses IEC-standard installation dimensions and power ratings.

technical_specifications.Product Type: Compact IP54 three-phase cage induction motor
technical_specifications.kW: 45-630 kW at 380 V; 220-1400 kW at 6000 V standard, with 1600 kW shown as not recommended; 220-1400 kW at 10000 V
technical_specifications.Standards: IEC72 installation dimensions and power ratings

features: Compact motor construction for easier integration
Higher protection degree than earlier Y-series designs
Improved technical performance and energy-saving design
Low noise and low vibration operation
Reliable mechanical design for industrial service
IEC72-aligned installation dimensions and power ratings

description: Brushless three-phase synchronous alternators (new series) with WT-2 AVR. 400V, 3-phase, 4-wire. Stable voltage, low distortion, and fast transient recovery across models 20–900.

name: T2W3 Series Synchronous Alternator
description: T2W3 series three-phase, 3-wire star-connected synchronous alternators with WT-2 AVR. Rated voltage 400V, 50Hz, 1500rpm, power factor 0.8 (lagging). Designed to GB/T765 standards with compact mounting options (IMB34/IMB3) and damper windings for reliable performance.
features: Stable output with low waveform distortion

name: TZH-N 184 Land Use Alternator
description: TZH-N 184 land-use brushless synchronous alternators with AVR. Rated for 40°C ambient and up to 1000 m altitude. Supports 120–600 V, 50/60 Hz, single- or three-phase operation, continuous duty (H=125°C/40°C).
features: AS440 AVR + three-phase induction detection module ±0.5% regulation (optional)
applications: Prime/standby power for industry and construction
Remote sites and mobile power trailers

name: UCW Series Brushless Synchronous Alternator
description: The UCW Series Brushless Synchronous Alternators deliver high-efficiency performance and steady power output across industrial and commercial applications. Designed for either 1500rpm or 1000rpm operation, the series spans a wide range of kVA ratings and frame sizes.

name: MECC Alte ECO / ECP Series Alternator
description: MECC Alte ECO and ECP 4-pole self-regulating alternators for diesel and gas generator sets. This page lists catalog type-code rows extracted from the scanned MECC Alte ECO alternator catalog, with industrial and marine ratings kept separate.

technical_specifications.Type Codes: ECO 28 S/4, ECO 28 1L/4, ECO 28 2L/4, ECO 28 VL/4, ECO 32-2S/4, ECO 32-3S/4, ECO 32-1L/4, ECO 32-2L/4, ECO 32-3L/4, ECP 34 1S, ECP 34 2S, ECP 34 1L, ECP 34 2L, ECO 38-1SN, ECO 38-2SN, ECO 38-3SN, ECO 38-1LN, ECO 38-2LN, ECO 38-3LN
technical_specifications.Industrial Rating Range: 16-420 kVA, 3-phase continuous, cos phi 0.8, ambient 40 C
technical_specifications.Marine Rating Range: 14-342 kVA, 3-phase continuous, cos phi 0.8, rise 90 C, ambient 45 C
technical_specifications.Insulation / Temperature Rise Columns: CL. H deltaT 125 C and CL. F deltaT 105 C
technical_specifications.Physical Data Included: J inertia, weight, air volume, and noise dB(A)

features: Catalog-derived type-code rows for ECO 28, ECO 32, ECP 34, and ECO 38N
Separate industrial and marine rating contexts
50 Hz and 60 Hz ratings with connection-voltage context
Physical specifications include inertia, weight, airflow, and noise
